title: Leandra ionopogon
taxonomy: Leandra ionopogon is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. It is a member of the genus Leandra, which consists of about 120 species of plants. The Melastomataceae family is a group of flowering plants that are commonly known as the "merremias" or the "melastome family". This family comprises around 170 genera and over 5,000 species. The classification of Leandra ionopogon reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary relationships within the Melastomataceae family.
